key_items: Bitcoin price extends decline below $78,500 with downside pressure building aggressively
Bitcoin whale-retail delta drops to ETF-era lows as smart money turns cautious
CLARITY Act advances toward early August signing with institutional regulatory clarity improving
reasoning: Near-term price action shows bearish technical weakness with $660M in liquidations and whale accumulation pausing, offset by positive macro catalysts including CLARITY Act regulatory progress, institutional inflows (Mubadala +16% BTC ETF stake, Gemini $100M commitment), and growing mainstream adoption. The neutral-to-slightly-bearish stance reflects short-term consolidation pressure around support levels while medium-term fundamentals remain constructive.
risks: Persistent macro headwinds from elevated Treasury yields combined with waning whale participation and technical breakdown below $76,500 support could accelerate liquidations toward $75k if broader equity markets weaken.
